CustomField.formula: IF( OR( flosum_connect__ShemaSystem__c = 'summary', flosum_connect__ShemaSystem__c = 'fixVersions', flosum_connect__ShemaSystem__c = 'reporter', flosum_connect__ShemaSystem__c = 'priority', flosum_connect__ShemaSystem__c = 'labels', flosum_connect__ShemaSystem__c = 'duedate', flosum_connect__ShemaSystem__c = 'description', flosum_connect__ShemaSystem__c = 'assignee', flosum_connect__ShemaSystem__c = 'parent', flosum_connect__ShemaCustomType__c = 'gh-epic-label', flosum_connect__ShemaCustomType__c = 'datepicker', flosum_connect__ShemaCustomType__c = 'datetime', flosum_connect__ShemaCustomType__c = 'textarea', flosum_connect__ShemaCustomType__c = 'message', flosum_connect__ShemaCustomType__c = 'multiselect', flosum_connect__ShemaCustomType__c = 'radiobuttons', flosum_connect__ShemaCustomType__c = 'labels', flosum_connect__ShemaCustomType__c = 'multicheckboxes', flosum_connect__ShemaCustomType__c = 'select', flosum_connect__ShemaCustomType__c = 'multiuserpicker' ), true, false)
CustomField.label: IsSupported
